MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via Zoom, for David Levin, Trustee.

Ms. Friedeberg reports that the accounting is complete, and her client is in the process of signing it and that it should be filed this week.

The matter is continued to Jun-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-15-299001 The Sara R. Julian 2007 Trust and
PTR-19-302554 The Sara R. Julian Special Needs Trsut.

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg appeared by zoom for Gene Marchi (Trustee of the 2007 Trust) and for David Levin (Trustee of the Special Needs Trust).

The Court waives the filing of an information-only inventory and appraisal by Mr. Levin and noted that there are missing pages of the 2007 trust. Ms. Friedeberg stated that Mr. Marchi is not intending to terminate the trust, that this was intended to be a final accounting, that the balance of the 2007 trust is now at a zero and that there is no reason why it can't be terminated. The Court invites Ms. Friedeberg to file an amendment to the petition to terminate the 2007 Trust. The Third and Final Account and Report of Successor Trustee; Petition for Its Settlement; for Approval of Trustee's and Attorneys' Fees and Costs Advanced; for Distribution of Property on Hand; for Exoneration of Bond; and for Discharge as Trustee, and the First Account and Report of Trustee; Petition for Its Settlement; for Approval of Trustee's and Attorneys' Fees and Costs Advanced; for Allowance of Payments to Trust Beneficiary; for Authorization of Allowance Payments to Trust Beneficiary; for Authorization of Periodic Payments to Trustee; and for Reduction of Bond are continued to August 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Continued To Jun-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via ZOOM, counsel for David Levin, Trustee.

At the onset, the court queries counsel regarding this matter and related matters. Counsel reports several issues which prevented her from finalizing the amended petitions but that the petitions are now in the filing queue.

After brief discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to June 28, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Continued To Aug-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-19-302554 The Sara R. Julian 2018 Special Needs Trust and PTR-19-302555 The Sara R. Julian Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg appeared by zoom for Trustees.

Ms. Friedeberg requested a four-week continuance stating that some issues need to be clarified in the accounting and that she thinks she can file the accounting in the next couple of weeks. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that there is one other related trust and the conservatorship, that the substituted judgment created two trusts and terminated one trust, that there were a lot of transfers and that they need more information to show how things got transferred. Status on filing of the Trustee's first accounting in both cases are continued to August 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
